
MINIKUBE INSTALLATION


curl -LO https://storage.googleapis.com/kubernetes-release/release/$(curl -s https://storage.googleapis.com/kubernetes-release/release/stable.txt)/bin/linux/amd64/kubectl
chmod +x kubectl
sudo mv kubectl /usr/local/bin/






HEY INSTALLATION


wget https://hey-release.s3.us-east-2.amazonaws.com/hey_linux_amd64
chmod +x hey_linux_amd64
sudo mv hey_linux_amd64 /usr/local/bin/hey






STRAT OF THE PROJECT


minikube start
docker build -t failure-detect-app:latest .
minikube image load failure-detect-app:latest
kubectl apply -f deployment.yaml
kubectl apply -f service.yaml
minikube addons enable metrics-server
kubectl apply -f hpa.yaml

kubectl apply -f k8s/monitoring/namespace.yaml
kubectl apply -f k8s/monitoring/prometheus.yaml
kubectl apply -f k8s/monitoring/loki.yaml
kubectl apply -f k8s/monitoring/promtail.yaml
kubectl apply -f k8s/monitoring/grafana.yaml






APP RUNNING


# app
minikube service failure-detect-service

# grafana (admin / admin123)
minikube service grafana-service -n monitoring

# prometheus
minikube service prometheus-service -n monitoring






PORT FORWARDING



# App
kubectl port-forward service/failure-detect-service 8080:3000 &

# Grafana
kubectl port-forward service/grafana-service 3030:3000 -n monitoring &

# Prometheus
kubectl port-forward service/prometheus-service 9090:9090 -n monitoring &


# Kill all existing port-forwards
pkill -f "kubectl port-forward"

# Wait a second
sleep 2

# Start fresh
kubectl port-forward service/failure-detect-service 8080:3000 2>/dev/null &
kubectl port-forward service/grafana-service 3030:3000 -n monitoring 2>/dev/null &
kubectl port-forward service/prometheus-service 9090:9090 -n monitoring 2>/dev/null &
